content.explanation: The differences between numbers next to each other are: 5-2=3, 11-5=6, 23-11=12. The differences (3, 6, 12) double each time. The next difference should be 24, so 23+24=47.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students may assume a constant difference of 12 and get 23+12=35
Students may see differences increasing by 6 each time (3,6,12,18) and get 23+18=41
Students may choose a round number that seems reasonable
